response:
Subject: Clarification Regarding Machine Vision Sensor Details

Dear Sir,

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision setup. Our device is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used in this device is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor (I have attached the technical data to this email).

Please refer to page 18 of the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications. For information on Quantum Efficiency, you can check page 13 of the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file.

I will review the files and manuals more carefully and get back to you with any further questions.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
